# Badger Grapple Red Engine v2.8

## Fixed
- Battle content was hidden behind the mat/background/UI panels.
- Text, HP bars, sprites, command panel, and result card now render above the panels.
- BattleScene now uses a separate background layer and high-depth UI layer.
- Added defensive fallback wrestlers if battle textures fail.
- B remains disabled during live battles.

## Verify
The note under the game should say:
`Engine v2.8 battle layer fix. Text, sprites, HP bars, and move UI render above panels.`
